articles.title: Ether’s Post-Shanghai Rally Knocks Bitcoin Dominance From 21-Month High
articles.description: ETH’s share of the total crypto market capitalization rose to a one-month high, according to TradingView data.

articles.title: Solana Launches Saga Smartphone To Compete With Apple And Google, How Much Does It Costs?
articles.description: The company behind the development of the blockchain, Solana Labs announced the launch of its long-awaited mobile phone, Saga. The announcement took place in a live event conducted by its Mobile division. articles.title: Gensler blasted by House Republicans over lack of Bankman-Fried details
articles.description: A House committee wants more information related to Sam Bankman-Fried from SEC Chair Gary Gensler ahead of testimony next week.

articles.title: Kraken set to unstake more than $1 billion worth of ETH after Shapella upgrade
articles.description: About $1 billion worth of ETH is set to be unstaked by Kraken.

articles.description: Solana’s Android phone is here, delivering a premium flagship with baked-in Web3 functionality. Can it hook the masses?

articles.title: Solana Saga, an Android Phone With a Crypto Twist
articles.description: The Solana Saga is designed to make it more seamless to make transactions on your pocket device

articles.description: Solana's crypto smartphone, called Saga, represents a bet on mobile as the future of crypto adoption.

articles.title: Top Ethereum DeFi Protocols Aave, Yearn Finance Struck By Exploit
articles.description: Two of Ethereum’s most popular decentralized finance (defi) protocols, Aave and Yearn Finance, have been affected by an exploit, according to early reports this morning from blockchain security firm PeckShield. The company directed a tweet to Aave asking it to verify a specific transaction hash. Hi @AaveAave @iearnfinance, you may want to take a look: […]

articles.title: Exploit involving early version of Yearn Finance saw damages of $11.6 million: PeckShield
articles.description: An exploit involving an early version of the DeFi protocol Yearn Finance took place earlier today, causing damages of $11.6 million, according to PeckShield.

articles.title: Ethereum’s pending withdrawals total $1.7 billion after Shapella
articles.description: Roughly eight hours after Ethereum's Shapella upgrade went live, more than $1.34 billion in ether is waiting to be withdrawn.
